creator: jack.pappas@tidepowerd.com
text:
I've updated the lang/fsharp port to the most recent version of F#. This version of F# is licensed under Apache 2.0, and it's now built from sources (pulled automatically from GitHub) instead of using pre-compiled binaries.

Fix: The supplied patch updates the port files for lang/fsharp to F# 3.0.25.

NOTE: This patch contains one new file (files/patch-configure.ac) which will need to be created with 'svn add'.

Patch attached with submission follows:
